signal_watch.author: LangChain

clusters.summary: A Harvey and LangChain Labs study on making LLM verifiers cheaper and more reliable for legal-agent evaluation and post-training.

clusters.summary: Learn how agent engineering combines product thinking, engineering, and data science to build reliable LLM systems. Ship faster with iterative testing.

clusters.summary: Learn how Deep Agents SDK manages context for long-running AI tasks through offloading, summarization, and filesystem abstraction to prevent context rot.

clusters.summary: Dosu uses evaluation driven development and LangSmith to build reliable LLM products at scale, monitor production performance, and iterate with confidence.

clusters.summary: Automate prompt engineering with Promptim's optimization library. Save time, improve AI performance, and switch models faster.

clusters.summary: LangSmith now provides end-to-end OpenTelemetry (OTel) support for applications built on LangChain and/or LangGraph.
